$comment: RFC 9728 OAuth 2.0 Protected Resource Metadata. Served under both /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource (no extension, via Pages Function) and /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource.json. Content is identical. PointCast APIs are mostly OPEN (no auth required) but we advertise the two authorization servers that CAN issue tokens we'd accept.
resource_name: PointCast — a living broadcast from El Segundo
